top3.sql:
SELECT County, School, ClosedDate
FROM schools
WHERE StatusType = 'Closed'
ORDER BY County, School;

WITH closed_schools AS (
    SELECT County, School, ClosedDate
    FROM schools
    WHERE StatusType = 'Closed' AND ClosedDate IS NOT NULL
),
county_counts AS (
    SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS school_count
    FROM closed_schools
    GROUP BY County
    ORDER BY school_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT cs.County, cs.School, cs.ClosedDate
FROM closed_schools cs
JOIN county_counts cc ON cs.County = cc.County
ORDER BY cs.County, cs.School;

SELECT County, School, ClosedDate
FROM schools
WHERE StatusType = 'Closed'
ORDER BY County, School;

WITH closed_schools AS (
    SELECT County, School, ClosedDate
    FROM schools
    WHERE StatusType = 'Closed' AND ClosedDate IS NOT NULL
),
county_counts AS (
    SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS school_count
    FROM closed_schools
    GROUP BY County
    ORDER BY school_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT cs.County, cs.School, cs.ClosedDate
FROM closed_schools cs
JOIN county_counts cc ON cs.County = cc.County
ORDER BY cs.County, cs.School;

WITH closed_schools AS (
    SELECT County, School, ClosedDate
    FROM schools
    WHERE StatusType = 'Closed' AND ClosedDate IS NOT NULL
),
top_county AS (
    SELECT County
    FROM closed_schools
    GROUP BY County
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT cs.County, cs.School, cs.ClosedDate
FROM closed_schools cs
JOIN top_county tc ON cs.County = tc.County
ORDER BY cs.School;

SELECT County, School, ClosedDate
FROM schools
WHERE StatusType = 'Closed'
ORDER BY County, School;

final.sql:
WITH closed_schools AS (
    SELECT County, School, ClosedDate
    FROM schools
    WHERE StatusType = 'Closed' AND ClosedDate IS NOT NULL
),
county_counts AS (
    SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS school_count
    FROM closed_schools
    GROUP BY County
    ORDER BY school_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT cs.County, cs.School, cs.ClosedDate
FROM closed_schools cs
JOIN county_counts cc ON cs.County = cc.County
ORDER BY cs.County, cs.School;
